Month_Year: The month and year when the service requests were made. It helps in understanding the time distribution of service requests.
Company_Name: The name of the company for which the service requests analysis is done. It gives context to the data and makes it easier to compare data across different companies.
Region: The geographical region for which the service requests were made. It helps in understanding the regional distribution of service requests.
Service_Type: The type of service which the requests were related to - software updates or hardware issues. It helps in understanding the nature of service requests.
Percentage_of_Service_Requests: The percentage of service requests related to a particular service type to total service requests. It helps in understanding the proportion of different types of service requests.
